description: Curated list of installable ShellFrame plugins. Add an entry per plugin you publish; the marketplace UI fetches this file (or a remote variant) and offers one-click install via git clone.

plugins.name: rokid-bridge
plugins.description: Rokid Glasses session bridge — capture/mic from glasses inject as ShellFrame prompts; replies push back to HUD. Plugin metadata lives at repo root; clone targets shellframe_plugins/rokid-bridge/.
plugins.author: Howard Wu
plugins.extra_setup: After install, run `./mac/install.sh` inside the cloned dir to register the listener LaunchAgent + Stop hook.
